'''Katykam''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Albino/Legends|albino]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who worked as [[Crying Dawn Singer]]'s stage manager. He wore loose [[Color/Legends|black]] pants and a red [[vest]], and smoked a [[Clay/Legends|clay]] [[Pipe/Legends|pipe]]. Katykam was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] agents from the [[Interrogation (Imperial Security Bureau)/Legends|Interrogation]] branch after the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Yearo Seville]] [[Operation 45RA|kidnapped]] Crying Dawn Singer.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Abduction]]'' {{Reprint|The Abduction}} {{1st}}
